payout_recommendation.rationale: Complete attack-steelman-patch structure with 3 concrete evidence links, specific patch scope naming tiered efficiency bonus + minimum efficiency threshold + dynamic multiplier decay. Attack cites real multiplier table from bounty board; steelman addresses Sybil resistance and energy counterpoint with actual hardware examples (SPARCstation 50W vs GPU 300W).

rankings.justification: wuxiaobinsh-gif submitted a structurally complete adversarial steelman citing the bounty board multiplier table as evidence with a 3-part patch addressing energy efficiency.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Two PR reviews submitted: #2802 (6 observations citing specific lines: client.py:36,65,41) and #2170 (4 technical comments). Both reviews provide concrete, testable feedback — not generic praise. Meets the 2 RTC tier.

rankings.justification: HuiNeng6 reviewed PR #2802 with 6 specific technical observations citing exact line numbers (client.py:36,65,41) and PR #2170 with 4 actionable comments.
